name: create_prefab
description: Create prefab assets from one or more scene GameObjects. Supports comma-separated names (e.g. 'Tree,Rock,Bush') to create multiple prefabs in one call to the same folder. Each prefab is named after its GameObject.

game_object.description: Name of the scene GameObject, or comma-separated names for batch creation (e.g. 'Tree,Rock,Bush').

path.description: Folder path for the prefab(s). Default 'Assets/Prefabs'.

file_name.description: Custom file name (single mode only). Defaults to the GameObject's name.

overwrite.description: If true, overwrites existing prefabs. Default false.
